name: designops-plugin
description: Build / dev tooling for the DesignOps-plugin marketplace skills. The skills themselves are the shipped artifact; this package.json exists only to host the repo's Node scripts (docs generator, template minifier, cache verifier, shadcn-props split).

scripts.build: npm run build:props && npm run build:docs && npm run build:min
scripts.verify: npm run build:props:check && npm run build:docs:check && npm run build:min:check && npm run qa:step-bundles && npm run qa:create-component-skill && npm run verify:component-slice-map && npm run verify-cache
